LABEL: 
Claim Diagnosis Code I – 25 Diagnosis Present on Admission (POA) Indicator Code 
DESCRIPTION: The present on admission (POA) indicator code associated with the diagnosis codes (principal and 
secondary; which are the ICD_DGNS_CD1–ICD_DGNS_CD25 fields). 
In response to the Deficit Reduction Act of 2005, CMS
